changeSet.author: content
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE class_authoring_idempotency ( id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(), scope TEXT NOT NULL, idem_key TEXT NOT NULL, request_hash TEXT NOT NULL, result_class_id uuid NOT NULL, package_id uuid, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), CONSTRAINT uq_class_authoring_idem UNIQUE (scope, idem_key) );
CREATE INDEX idx_class_authoring_idem_created ON class_authoring_idempotency (created_at);
